Pooh's Heffalump Movie (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $18,098,433Details
International Box Office $37,588,511
Worldwide Box Office $55,686,944
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,805,559 (32.1% of total gross)
Legs:3.12 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:32.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,529 opening theaters/2,529 max. theaters, 3.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $33,768,677

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 11th, 2005 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: May 27th, 2005 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: May 24th, 2005 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: G
Running Time: 68 minutes
Franchise: Winnie the Pooh

Plot point: Living Toys, Talking Animals
Subgenre: Family Adventure

Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Hand Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production Countries: United States
